summary: Phase 4 Modal Consolidation Testing - FundTransferDialog extracted from FundManagementPage. All tests PASSED. FundTransferDialog correctly opens for all 4 transfer types with appropriate auth fields. Phase 2 and Phase 3 regression tests also passed.
critical_code_review_comments: FundTransferDialog.js correctly implements reusable fund transfer dialog with props: open, onClose, transferType, walletByType, branchId, onSuccess

All data-testid attributes correctly implemented: fund-transfer-dialog, fund-transfer-title, fund-transfer-available, fund-transfer-amount, fund-transfer-note, fund-transfer-manager-pin, fund-transfer-totp, fund-transfer-owner-pin, fund-transfer-target-cashier, fund-transfer-target-safe, fund-transfer-cancel, fund-transfer-confirm
FundManagementPage.js correctly imports and uses FundTransferDialog component instead of inline dialog code
Dialog uses custom overlay (z-9999, raw div) consistent with AuthDialog pattern
Confirm button correctly disabled when amount is empty
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 modal consolidation complete. FundTransferDialog.js is the extracted component from FundManagementPage. All 4 transfer types tested: Cashier→Safe (Manager PIN), Safe→Cashier (Manager PIN), Safe→Bank (TOTP), Capital Injection (Owner PIN/TOTP + target selector). Phase 2 InvoiceDetailModal and Phase 3 VerifyPinDialog/AuthDialog regression tests passed.

tests_performed.details: Page shows Cashier Drawer (₱126,377.25), Physical Safe (₱1,000,000.00), Digital/E-Wallet (₱10,261.00), Bank Account (₱0.00) when Branch 1 is selected

tests_performed.test: Cashier → Safe transfer button opens FundTransferDialog
tests_performed.details: Dialog opens with correct title, available balance from Cashier Drawer, amount input, note input, Manager PIN field, Cancel and Confirm Transfer buttons

tests_performed.test: Safe → Cashier transfer button opens FundTransferDialog
tests_performed.details: Dialog opens with Manager PIN auth field, available balance from Physical Safe

tests_performed.test: Safe → Bank transfer button opens FundTransferDialog
tests_performed.details: Dialog opens with TOTP Code auth field (6-digit authenticator code), available balance from Physical Safe
Dialog opens with Cashier/Safe target selector buttons and Owner PIN/TOTP field
Cancel button successfully closes the dialog for all transfer types

tests_performed.test: Confirm Transfer button disabled when amount empty
tests_performed.details: Confirm button has disabled attribute when amount input is empty
InvoiceDetailModal opens from Sales History with Print Full, Print 58mm, View on Phone, Upload Receipt, Verify, Edit buttons
VerifyPinDialog opens from sale detail Verify button with PIN input, Flag a discrepancy toggle, Cancel and Verify Transaction buttons
